title: mod_include Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and configurations for using mod_include in Apache.

commands.description: Load the mod_include module in Apache configuration.
commands.scenario: Use when enabling server-side includes (SSI) in Apache.

commands.description: Enable server-side includes in a directory.
commands.scenario: Use in a directory's .htaccess or Apache config to allow SSI.

commands.description: Set the MIME type for .shtml files to text/html.
commands.scenario: Use to ensure .shtml files are processed as HTML for SSI.

commands.description: Apply the INCLUDES filter to .shtml files for SSI processing.
commands.scenario: Use to enable SSI processing on .shtml files.

commands.command:
<Directory "/var/www/html">
    Options +Includes
    AllowOverride None
    Require all granted
</Directory>
commands.description: Example Apache configuration to enable SSI in a specific directory.
commands.scenario: Use to configure SSI for a specific directory in Apache.

commands.description: Include another file within an SSI-enabled HTML file.
commands.scenario: Use to include common elements like footers or headers in HTML files.

commands.description: Echo the current local date and time in an SSI-enabled file.
commands.scenario: Use to display dynamic date and time in HTML files.

commands.description: Set a variable in an SSI-enabled file.
commands.scenario: Use to define variables for use within SSI-enabled HTML.

commands.description: Conditional SSI to display content based on request method.
commands.scenario: Use to serve different content based on HTTP request method.

commands.description: Include configuration files from a directory if they exist.
commands.scenario: Use to modularize Apache configuration files.

commands.description: Conditional configuration for SSI if mod_include is available.
commands.scenario: Use to conditionally apply SSI settings if mod_include is loaded.

commands.description: Set the time format for SSI date output.
commands.scenario: Use to customize the display format of dates in SSI.
